content:
type: CLAIM
files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image.py
summary: Adding backup/backup_suffix params to Image.save() to auto-backup existing files before overwrite

fields.summary: Adding backup/backup_suffix params to Image.save() to auto-backup existing files before overwrite

content:
type: STATUS
files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image.py
summary: My backup changes are complete and tested (195 passed). In Image.save(): added 'backup = params.pop("backup", False)' and 'backup_suffix = params.pop("backup_suffix", ".bak")' right after the save_all pop line; then inside 'if open_fp:' block, right after computing 'created = not os.path.exists(filename)' and before the append/w+b branching, I insert: if backup and not created: copy filename to filename+backup_suffix via shutil.copy2 (added 'import shutil' at top). This only touches ~6 lines total in the open_fp branch before the fp = builtins.open(...) calls -- should be easy to rebase your dry_run branching around it (e.g. skip backup entirely when dry_run is True, or place backup check before your BytesIO substitution). Also added 3 new tests (test_save_backup, test_save_backup_custom_suffix, test_save_backup_no_existing_file) right before test_dump in Tests/test_image.py. Happy to adjust ordering if you tell me your exact insertion point.
